cycle: scheduled-live-ensemble (authoritative; pools two independent same-day ensemble runs, run1 archived as research_2026-07-08_run1.json)
ensemble: 2x opus-4.8 (inside/outside) + 2x codex gpt-5.5 xhigh; round-2 half-anchor on cruxes; verification per PROTOCOL 3.5; final q = mean of run1 and run2 family finals

items.title: Fed maintains rate (0bps hike) at the July 29, 2026 FOMC meeting
items.rationale: Carried from run1 (not re-run in run2). CME FedWatch (07-07) ~73% hold vs market ~0.77; consensus 0.73, family divergence 0.03; NO-side edge ~3pt below the 0.035 live gate. Won't fade CME on noise -> no-trade. (3.17M-OI market, no realistic edge.)

items.title: SpaceX launches Starship flight test #13 before July 17, 2026
items.rationale: POOLED of two same-day runs (run1 0.32/0.22; run2 0.20/0.31). Timing bet: Flight 13 (return-to-flight after Flight 12's May 22 booster-reignition anomaly / hard splashdown) must launch before Jul 17 03:59Z; NET Jul 14-15 leaves only ~29h slack. VERIFICATION (both runs) found the key fact the initial blind lacked: Ship 40 completed a full 6-engine static fire on Jul 2 -> blind (which assumed NET stale / static fire unconfirmed) voided and re-estimated free of half-anchor per PROTOCOL 3.5. Binding UNCONFIRMED gates remain: Booster 20 static fire + FAA launch license, ~6 days out; new V3/Block-3 vehicle + near-new pad (OLP-2) whose debut NETs slip more often than hold. Pooled consensus 0.263 vs market ~0.29 -> ~3pt sub-threshold; pooled family divergence 0.005. NO-TRADE (efficient after correction; verification prevented a wrong-signed NO bet).

items.title: The Odyssey (Nolan) Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer above 90 (settle 2026-07-20)
items.rationale: POOLED of two same-day runs (run1 0.66/0.68 consensus 0.67; run2 0.645/0.565 consensus 0.605). Strict >90 (91+) bar, locked Mon Jul 20; wide release Jul 17, full critic embargo lifts ~Jul 15 (NO official score exists yet). Core bull: uniformly glowing early reactions (Variety 'astonishing achievement'; 'best Greek-myth adaptation ever'; BP frontrunner; Oppenheimer-tier), and Nolan prestige films all cleared 90 (Oppenheimer 93/Dunkirk 92/Dark Knight 94). Core bear (divergence source): strict cutoff + hyped-opening drift as full review body lands; only ~4/9 Nolan films clear 91+ across whole filmography. VERIFICATION: no leaked Tomatometer, buzz only reinforced; the Polymarket '92%' is the >=60% strike, not this >90 strike. All 8 same-day blind estimates (0.43-0.72) sit at/below market 0.70 -> NO direction robust, but pooled consensus 0.638 gives NO edge only ~4.25pt gross (~2.7pt after fees) < 0.035 live gate -> NO-TRADE. Note calibration humility: recent model Brier 0.125 > market 0.079, so a marginal soft-target fade defers to market. Pooled family divergence 0.03 (converged; not human-flagged).
